section_capital-gains_localTitle: Câștiguri din transferul titlurilor de valoare
section_capital-gains_desc: Income from selling stocks, ETFs, and other securities.
section_dividends_desc: Dividend income received from foreign brokers.
section_cass_localTitle: Contribuția de asigurări sociale de sănătate
section_cass_desc: Mandatory health insurance contribution based on total non-salary income.
cg-proceeds_desc: Total proceeds from selling securities (used to compute the net gain)
cg-cost_desc: Total acquisition cost (used to compute the net gain)
cg-net_desc: Net annual gain from transferring securities (proceeds minus cost)
cg-tax_desc: Tax on the net gain (10% for tax year 2025)
div-foreign-tax_desc: Tax withheld at source by the broker, abroad
div-tax_desc: Remaining dividend tax to pay in Romania, after the foreign tax credit
